para_trans: Forest Land - Chandrapur
Diversion of 80.77 ha Forest Land for Renewal of

Mining lease under Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 for Durgapur Open Cast Mine Project in Compartment No. 400 and 401 of Chandrapur 'Forest Division, Chandrapur District of Maharashtra.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Government Order No.: No. FLD-2019/C.R.310/F-10
Mantralaya, Mumbai-400 032.
Ref.:
1) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur, Letter No. Desk-17/NC/I/I.D-/896/19-20, dt.23.08.2019.
2) Revenue and Forest Department, Government of Maharashtra, Government letter No. FLD-2019/C.R.310/F-10, dt.19.06.2024.
3) Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change (Forest Conservation Division), Government of India, New Delhi Letter dt. 06.05.2025.
4) Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (HoFF), Maharashtra State, Nagpur, Letter No. Desk-17/FCA-S1/1/PID-6704/Chandrapur 2004/2024-25/1308, dt.02.09.2025.
5) Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change (Forest Conservation Division), Government of India, New Delhi Letter dt. 30.09.2025.
6) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer,
Maharashtra State, Nagpur, Letter No. Desk-17/FCA-S1/1/PID-
Letter No. Desk-17/FCA-S1/1/PID-6704/Chandrapur 2004/2024-25/3100,
Order :
Whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal
Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur, vide his letter under   reference No.1 has submitted a
proposal for diversion of 80.77 ha Forest Land for Renewal of Mining lease under Van
(Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 for Durgapur Open Cast Mine
Project in Compartment No. 400 and 401 of Chandrapur Forest Division, Chandrapur
District of Maharashtra.
AND whereas, the State Government vide under letter reference No.2 has sent
the proposal for approval of Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change,
Government of India, New Delhi;
AND whereas, the Government of India after due consideration, vide letter
Under reference No.3, accorded 'In-principle' approval to divert the 80.77 ha. The forest
Land for the above project under section 2 Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan)
Adhiniyam, 1980. The said approval is subject to fulfillment of certain conditions by the
User Agency;
AND whereas, the Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (HoFF), Maharashtra
State, Nagpur, vide letters under reference No.4 has submitted compliance of those
conditions to the Government of India;
AND whereas, Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change (Forest
Conservation Division), Government of India, New Delhi, vide under   reference no. 5
Accorded 'Final approval' to divert the 80.77 ha of forest land in preference of the area
General Manager, Western Coalfields Ltd., Chandrapur for Renewal of Mining lease
under Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 for Durgapur Open Cast
Mine Project in Compartment No. 400 and 401 of Chandrapur Forest Division,
Chandrapur District of Maharashtra.
AND whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal
Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur vide letters under reference No.6 has requested
State Government to issue diversion order in the matter;
NOW, therefore, Government of Maharashtra hereby directs that the area of
80.77 ha. consisting of Reserved Forest Land more specifically described in the
proposal submitted vide letter under reference No. | and as per details given in the Schedule given below, be diverted to the User Agency, 1.e. The Area General Manager,
Western Coalfields Ltd., Chandrapur for Renewal of Mining lease under Van
(Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 for Durgapur Open Cast Mine
Project in Compartment No. 400 and 401 of Chandrapur Forest Division, Chandrapur
District of Maharashtra.
The diversion shall be effected subject to the terms and conditions mentioned in
the letter dated 06.05.2025 and dated 30.09.2025 of Ministry of Environment, Forests &
Climate Change (Forest Conservation Division), Government of India, New Delhi. This
approval for diversion of forest land is also subject to compliance of following
conditions by the User Agency-
The User Agency shall comply with all the conditions stipulated in the 'in-principle'.
and 'final approval' letters of the Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate
Change (Forest Conservation Division), Government of India, New Delhi,
referred above. The Conservator of Forests (T), Chandrapur shall ensure the
strict compliance of the conditions by the User Agency and shall furnish the
report in this regard to Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests and
Nodal Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur from time to time.
2. Non-compliance of any of the conditions mentioned in Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change (Forest Conservation Division), Government of
India, New Delhi letters dated 06.05.2025 and dated 30.09.2025, in this order
and Rules & Guidelines made / issued under Van (Sanrakshan Evam
Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980, shall amount to violation of Van (Sanrakshan
Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 and action would be taken accordingly.
3. For ensuring the compliances and for monitoring the duly prescribed activities
and also to carry out other statuary duties, user agency shall facilitate unhindered access/entry in the area to the local forest Officer. In case the user agency
prohibits the free access or create hindrances, the permission given under this
Order for the diversion of forest area for the non-forest use shall be withdrawn.
In case of non-compliance of any of the above conditions, The Conservator of Forests (T), Chandrapur shall report through the State Government to the
Deputy Director General of Forests (Central), Regional Office, Ministry of
Environment, Forests & Climate Change, Government of India, Nagpur as per procedure laid down in guidelines under the Van (Sanrakshan Evam
Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980.
Schedule
